message:
test(cli): Add comprehensive tests for project command

Improve test coverage for project command:
- YAML format export
- Invalid parameter validation (format, per-category, top, output)
- Deprecated --top warning when used with --per-category
- File output with --output and --force flags
- Human-readable output modes

Coverage improved from 75% to 96%.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
